title: Zythmnr
content:

{{Quote|He is the ''one'' we have waited for… Bring him to the ''Temple of Fire!''|translated=1|Zythmnr, after seeing the unconscious Exar Kun|<ref name="darklords4" />}}
'''Zythmnr''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Massassi/Legends|Massassi]] [[Sith temple/Legends|temple]] [[Priest/Legends|priest]] who lived on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] leading up to the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. Zythmnr belonged to a Massassi tribe that was descended from the [[Sith/Legends|followers]] of [[Death/Legends|deceased]] [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]], who came to Yavin 4 in [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]]. After attaining a position of authority in his tribe, Zythmnr withdrew, spending twelve years in solitude. The Massassi priest emerged in [[3997 BBY]], when fallen [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] was knocked unconscious in a fight with Massassi guards in a Yavin 4 forest. Believing that Kun was someone whom they had been waiting for, Zythmnr brought a bound Kun to the structure known as the [[Temple of Fire]], and summoned an ancient [[Sith wyrm]] to test the former [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi's]] power. [[Telekinesis/Legends|Taking possession]] of Zythmnr's powerful [[Sith talisman/Legends|Sith amulets]], Kun defeated the [[Sithspawn/Legends|Sithspawn]], winning the allegiance of Zythmnr and the other Massassi. Kun eventually learned the secrets of Sadow's [[Sith alchemy/Legends|Sith alchemy]], discovering how to change a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] being into a vessel of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]]. Zythmnr was the first to volunteer for the procedure, which successfully transformed him into a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] manifestation of the dark side.

==Biography==
{{Quote|Do not struggle against your bonds, intruder! You will be freed when the time is right.|Zythmnr, to a bound Exar Kun|<ref name="audio">[[Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith'' audio drama]]</ref>}}
Zythmnr, a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Massassi/Legends|Massassi]], was a native of the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. Zythmnr belonged to a tribe of Massassi that descended from the followers of former [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]],<ref name="darklords4" /> who fled to Yavin 4 after his defeat at the [[second battle of Korriban]] in [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]].<ref name="end">[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 5|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 5]]</ref> Sadow used [[Sith sorcery/Legends|Sith magic]] to twist Zythmnr's ancestors into violent, uncivilized beasts who utilized the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] to wield their weapons. By Zythmnr's time, the Massassi tribe had one duty, to watch over the [[Sith temple/Legends|Sith temples]] built by their ancestors. Zythmnr eventually became a temple [[Priest/Legends|priest]] and came into the possession of a pair of [[Sith talisman/Legends|Sith amulets]]. In [[4009 BBY]], he withdrew from the outside world and spent the next twelve [[Standard year/Legends|years]] in solitude. In [[3997 BBY]], Yavin 4 was visited by the fallen [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]], who came to the moon at the behest of the [[Force ghost/Legends|spirit]] of [[Death/Legends|dead]] Dark [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Freedon Nadd]] to further his knowledge of the dark side of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. However, Kun was quickly defeated by Massassi guards, and after twelve years of self-imposed isolation, Zythmnr emerged from his place of solitude to examine Kun. The temple priest proclaimed that Kun was the one they had been waiting for, and ordered that the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] be brought to the [[Temple of Fire]].<ref name="darklords4" />

[[File:ZythmnrTransformed.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Zythmnr, in the process of being transformed by Exar Kun.]]
Zythmnr ordered that Kun be placed in restraints, and once they reached the Temple of Fire, he accused the Jedi of coming to steal his [[Sith artifact/Legends|Sith amulet]]. Although Kun denied it, the Massassi priest branded him a liar and demanded that he be thrown into a pit in the structure.<ref name="audio" /> Zythmnr placed the Sith [[Force artifact/Legends|amulet]] on the broken [[statue of Naga Sadow]] and then the priest and the other Massassi elders fell to their knees, muttering ancient spells under the broken statues that lined the temple. Their chants released a torrential power and a throbbing beat, along with the smell of burning flesh that filled the temple.<ref name="darklords4" /> Suddenly, a [[Sith wyrm]]<ref name="dss" /> [[Sithspawn/Legends|created]] long ago by Naga Sadow's [[Sith alchemy/Legends|Sith alchemy]] as a guardian against the [[Dark Lord prophecy|future Dark Lord of the Sith]] appeared and attacked Kun. Calling upon the power of the dark side, Kun used the Force to [[Telekinesis/Legends|take]] Zythmnr's Sith amulet and used its dark properties to destroy the monster. Kun's display of power won the allegiance of the Massassi, including Zythmnr.<ref name="darklords4" /> Now the leader of the Yavin 4 Massassi, Kun ordered Zythmnr's clan to build temples that would focus great dark side energies. The fallen Jedi began to study Sith alchemy and discovered a procedure that could transform a living creature into a manifestation of the dark side. Zythmnr agreed to be the first to receive the ancient empowerment, and although the Massassi priest was hesitant about the procedure, Kun reassured him by telling him that the process was painless and that Zythmnr would become the greatest of all the Massassi.<ref name="darklords5">[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 5|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 5]]</ref>

When the transformation began, Kun fused Zythmnr's skin with metallic [[Armor/Legends|bioarmor]] and enhanced the priest's [[Bone/Legends|bone]] structure and muscle mass. Zythmnr's [[Claw/Legends|claws]] became razor-sharp, and his hide became a hardened plating. Despite Kun's promises to the contrary, the procedure was excruciatingly painful for the Massassi priest. However, Zythmnr survived and urged that the experiments continue. Kun then infused Zythmnr with the dark side, using some of his own physical makeup as a template. The priest took well to the treatment and showed potential with the Force, prompting Kun to perform the same procedure on several dozen more Massassi.<ref name="dss" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|You sought to rob our temple! To steal our power!|Zythmnr, to Exar Kun|<ref name="audio" />}}
Zythmnr initially held a great deal of contempt for Exar Kun, going so far as to threaten to kill him and to release a Sith wyrm to attack him. The Massassi priest was very protective of his powerful Sith amulet, causing him to be mistrustful of Kun, as he believed the fallen Jedi was going to steal them. He was also protective of his temple, accusing Kun of seeking to rob it.<ref name="audio" /> Zythmnr was unflinchingly loyal, pledging his allegiance to Kun after the Jedi Knight proved himself worthy,<ref name="darklords4" /> even agreeing to be experimented upon after Kun discovered the secrets of Sith alchemy. Despite his loyalty to Kun, Zythmnr was still hesitant and reluctant to undergo the procedure that would make him a dark side vessel.<ref name="darklords5" /> Zythmnr was bilingual, speaking both the [[Massassi (language)|Massassi language]]<ref name="darklords4" /> and [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic]].<ref name="audio" />

==Powers and abilities==
{{Quote|Focused on ''you'', Zythmnr, the dark side of the Force will transform you into the ''greatest'' of all the Massassi!|Exar Kun, to Zythmnr|<ref name="darklords5" />}}
Zythmnr, although not a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]],<ref name="dss" /> was able to wield the power of the Sith amulet upon his assumption of the temple priest position.<ref name="darklords4" /> However, when Exar Kun discovered the effects of Sith alchemy and transformed Zythmnr into a vessel of the dark side, Zythmnr became able to touch the Force. After some training, the Massassi priest showed potential with the Force.<ref name="dss" />

==Behind the scenes==
Zythmnr made his first appearance in [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi - Dark Lords of the Sith'']], a story arc of the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series, written by [[Kevin J. Anderson]] and [[Tom Veitch]], and released from late [[1994]] to early [[1995]]. Zythmnr made two appearances in ''Dark Lords of the Sith'', in the arc's [[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 4|fourth]]<ref name="darklords4" /> and [[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 5|fifth]] issues,<ref name="darklords5" /> and he was indirectly mentioned on the first page of the [[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 6|sixth and final issue]].<ref name="darklords6">[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 6|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 6]]</ref> In these appearances, Zythmnr was illustrated by [[Chris Gossett]].<ref name="darklords4" /><ref name="darklords5" /> Zythmnr also appears in the [[Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith (audio drama)|''Dark Lords of the Sith'' audio adaptation]], though his name is not mentioned.<ref name="audio" /> Further information on the Massassi priest was provided in [[Bill Slavicsek]] and [[J.D. Wiker]]'s [[2001]] ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' sourcebook, ''[[The Dark Side Sourcebook]]''.<ref name="dss" />

In the ''Dark Lord of the Sith'' comics, Zythmnr spoke in the Massassi language,<ref name="darklords4" /> but in the audio drama he spoke in Basic.<ref name="audio" /> For the purposes of this article, he is treated as if he spoke both languages.
